summary: Phase F Document Branding Unification testing complete. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) invoice_branding_routes.py was not registered in server.py - now registered, (2) _find_quote in pdf_generation_routes.py was not searching quotes_v2 by ObjectId - now fixed. Also improved StatementPage.jsx to always show PDF download button when statement is loaded. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Settings Hub Document Branding tab, Delivery Notes page with PDF button, Statement page with PDF button.
critical_code_review_comments: invoice_branding_routes.py was deregistered but still needed - now re-registered
_find_quote function was only searching quotes collection by ObjectId, not quotes_v2 - now searches both
StatementPage.jsx PDF download button was conditional on customer_name/company - now always shows when statement loaded
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/StatementPage.jsx (PDF button always visible when statement loaded)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase F Document Branding Unification complete. Key endpoints: /api/pdf/invoices/{id}/preview, /api/pdf/quotes/{id}/preview, /api/pdf/orders/{id}/preview, /api/pdf/delivery-notes/{id}/preview, /api/pdf/statements/{email}/preview, /api/admin/settings/invoice-branding. Key pages: /admin/settings-hub (Document Branding tab), /admin/delivery-notes (PDF button on cards), /admin/statements (PDF download button). All document types (Invoice, Quote, Delivery Note, Statement) use unified branding from business_settings.invoice_branding via _get_branding() helper.

frontend_ui.settings_hub_document_branding_tab: PASS - shows Company Logo, Contact details, CFO fields, Signature toggle, Stamp toggle, Footer preview
frontend_ui.delivery_notes_page_pdf_button: PASS - PDF button visible on delivery note cards
frontend_ui.statement_page_pdf_button: PASS - Download PDF button visible when statement loaded

bugs_fixed.issue: _find_quote only searched quotes collection by ObjectId, not quotes_v2
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated _find_quote to search both quotes and quotes_v2 collections by ObjectId

bugs_fixed.issue: StatementPage PDF download button only visible when customer_name/company exists
bugs_fixed.fix: Made PDF download button always visible when statement is loaded, showing email as fallback

mocked_apis_list: Resend email service - dry-run mode, logs to console instead of sending emails
